title: Repository Simplification — Sprint 4.8 Objective 6
description: Removed 11 empty placeholder directories, consolidated 3 tsconfig files into base+extend pattern, archived 7 historical documents to 99-Archive/, removed empty docs/Review/ and docs/governance/knowledge/sprint-4.6/ directories.
impact: Reduced directory sprawl by 11 dirs, reduced config duplication via tsconfig.base.json, moved 7 low-value historical files out of active documentation tree. Repository is simpler to navigate.
